news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋去中心化交易所交易量增长驱动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume from new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3. The upgrade promises stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链生态连接。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币基金会研究小组发布草案，计划采用ZK-Rollup Layer2扩容，以降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation research group releases a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce fees for small transactions.
